title: Dimensional Pockets II
description: Add your very own Pocket Dimensions to Minecraft!
body: ![Main Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a331033a058adcd71eeb13192cb82366f55a60de.png) # **Dimensional Pockets II** ### **Notices** Dimensional Pockets II is available for **1.21.1**. It is in full release stage, with many improvements over previous versions. It currently has full compatibility with dedicated servers. Please don't hesitate to report any issues to the GitHub Issues page. ### **Description** Dimensional Pockets II is a Minecraft mod that lets players create customizable, pocket-sized dimensions for storage, automation, and more. These portable dimensions function as personalized bases that can be accessed anywhere, offering limitless expansion within a limited space. Use modular upgrades to enhance your Pocket Dimension such as crafting stations, charging docks and interfaces making it a versatile tool for adventurers and builders alike. Dimensional Pockets II also introduces a variety of new armour, weapons and tools for the budding adventurer. ## **Mod Showcase** Check out this **fantastic** Mod Showcase for the **1.18.1** version: ### **Discord Server** Don't forget to check out the Discord server for helpful tips, direct support or feature requests [here](https://discord.gg/8ydCtzm). ### **16x Resource Pack** Check out the more faithful resource pack for those craving a vanilla look [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dimensional-pockets-ii-16x). ### **Issue Reporting** If you experience issues, crashes, bugs or anything that you don't think should happen, then please raise an issue on the GitHub page [here](https://github.com/TheCosmosSeries/DimensionalPocketsII/issues). ### **Dependencies** - Dimensional Pockets II requires **Cosmos Library** in order to function, please download the latest version [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmos-library). - Dimensional Pockets II also has **JEI Integration**. - For versions **1.20.1** or older, **Forge** is required, and for newer versions **NeoForge** is required. ## **The Cosmos Series** This mod is part of **[The Cosmos Series](https://modrinth.com/organization/the-cosmos-series)**.
